def solve(nums, k)
    current_sum = 0
    dp_prev = 0
    remainder_map = {0 => 0}

                remainder_map[r] = val
            end
        else
            remainder_map[r] = val
        end
        dp_prev = dp_current
    end
    current_sum - dp_prev
end

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {

    let currentSum = 0;

    let dpPrev = 0;

    const remainderMap = new Map<number, number>();

    remainderMap.set(0, 0); // initial value for s[0] = 0, dp[0] - s[0] = 0 - 0 = 0

    for (const num of nums) {

        currentSum += num;

        const r = currentSum % k;

        let candidate = -Infinity;

        if (remainderMap.has(r)) {

            candidate = remainderMap.get(r) + currentSum;

        }

        const dpCurrent = Math.max(dpPrev, candidate);

        // Update the remainderMap for the current r with (dpCurrent - currentSum)

        const val = dpCurrent - currentSum;

        if (remainderMap.has(r)) {

            if (val > remainderMap.get(r)) {

                remainderMap.set(r, val);

            }

        } else {

            remainderMap.set(r, val);

        }

        dpPrev = dpCurrent;

    }

    return currentSum - dpPrev;

}

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {

    let currentSum = 0;

    let dpPrev = 0;

    const remainderMap = new Map<number, number>();

    remainderMap.set(0, 0); // initial value for s[0] = 0, dp[0] - s[0] = 0 - 0 = 0

    for (const num of nums) {

        currentSum += num;

        const r = currentSum % k;

        let candidate = -Infinity;

        if (remainderMap.has(r)) {

            candidate = remainderMap.get(r) + currentSum;

        }

        const dpCurrent = Math.max(dpPrev, candidate);

        // Update the remainderMap for the current r with (dpCurrent - currentSum)

        const val = dpCurrent - currentSum;

        if (remainderMap.has(r)) {

            if (val > remainderMap.get(r)) {

                remainderMap.set(r, val);

            }

        } else {

            remainderMap.set(r, val);

        }

        dpPrev = dpCurrent;

    }

    return currentSum - dpPrev;

}
